sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id Integer, event_time DateTime);
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_time) VALUES (1, fromUnixTimestamp(423543535));
SELECT id, fromUnixTimestamp(1234334543) AS event_date FROM test_dates;
UPDATE test_dates SET event_time = fromUnixTimestamp(987654321) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, fromUnixTimestamp(1577836800, '%Y-%m-%d %R:%S') AS formatted_date FROM test_dates;
